instruction_following.question: How should I organize the different parts of a webpage in HTML?
instruction_following.llm_response: Use semantic tags like <header>, <nav>, <main>, and <footer>. <header> defines the top section or introduction, <nav> contains navigation links, <main> holds the primary page content, and <footer> provides closing or sitewide information
